text:
The smart plug control is now implemented. The API `/api/devices/1/toggle` can turn the plug on/off.

For the frontend showing "off": the plug is actually on (switch_1: true), but the charger may not draw power without a phone connected. Connect your phone to the charger and check the data again—it should show power consumption.

To add an on/off switch in the frontend:
- In `frontend/index.html`, add a toggle button in the devices section.
- In `frontend/script.js`, add a click handler that calls the toggle API.

Example button: `<button onclick="toggleDevice(1)">Toggle</button>`

Run the integration to confirm power draw with the phone connected.
